subcodes.first_line: O Thou Incomparable God! Make Thou these hearts intimate with Thy Mystery; suffer them to be detached from the known and from the unknown
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بی نیاز این دلها را براز خویش دمساز کن و از بیگانه و خویش بی نیاز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for nearness to God
